title: Token bucket rate limiter per client

difficulty.rationale: Requires continuous time-based token refill math, a hard capacity cap that prevents accumulation, correct fractional-token bookkeeping with floor for the remaining header, and integer Retry-After computation.

gates.name: security_baseline
gates.requirement: no hidden test access or network egress

must: An initial burst of five succeeds and the sixth returns 429.
Tokens refill continuously over elapsed time at one per 200ms.
Allowed responses carry X-RateLimit-Remaining equal to the floored token count.
429 responses carry an integer Retry-After of at least one second.
must_not: Allow tokens to exceed capacity after a long idle period.
Share buckets across different client ids.
Return plain text or HTML for API responses.
edge_cases: After draining, a partial wait refills only the accrued whole tokens.
A long idle period still caps the burst at five requests.

reward_model.description: Harbor reward.txt is computed by the bun-bench gate model in tests/test.sh.
